response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as Yuzuki Choco's 2026 birthday festival. 2. Detected two vocal performances: '初恋大戦争' and '大人なフリして。'. 3. Found performer names and artist credits on-screen. 4. Conducted searches for lyrics, transcribing them from the video's on-screen text as official versions for the new original song were not fully available via search. 5. Constructed the scene breakdown with timestamps.
response.global_summary: The video showcases Yuzuki Choco's 2026 birthday festival. It features two song performances: '初恋大戦争' (Hatsukoi Daisensou) performed by Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy, and '大人なフリして。' (Otona na furi shite.) performed by Yuzuki Choco. The performances are separated by a talking and announcement segment.

scenes.description: Performance of '初恋大戦争' (Hatsukoi Daisensou) by Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy.
scenes.performer_in_video: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なんども試作した
横を練習もした
夜明けになどなるな
大丈夫自分史上1番
可愛い私なんだから
君は私と結ばれます
結ばれる運命なのです
本命あげちゃうめるきん
誰にも渡さない大戦争
時めいちゃいます
めるしそれじゃってとつがないじゃん
内緒でと
ツイツイキス
甘くていいの
ツイツイハグ
恋の愛一緒
初恋なんだもん
絶退譲らない覚悟です
大きなのです
目を見ていって
君の気持ち
ピュアラピュアラ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Often I've rehearsed this
I've practiced sideways too
Don't let it turn to dawn
It's okay, I'm the best in my personal history
Because I'm cute
You will be bound to me
It's a destiny to be bound
I'll give you my true feelings, Melkin
This is a great war I won't let anyone win
My heart beats for you
Merci, it's not like that, don't you see?
In secret, with you
Twist, twist, kiss
It's sweet, it's okay
Twist, twist, hug
Love's love together
It's my first love
I'm determined not to give up
It's a big one
Look into my eyes and say it
Your feelings
Pure-ah, Pure-ah...

scenes.description: Talking and announcement segment for the birthday festival.
Performance of '大人なフリして。' (Otona na furi shite.) by Yuzuki Choco.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
大人なフリして。
急に会いたいって
いつものように準備してる
午前零時過ぎの終電で向かう
って返した
やめとけなよって言われても...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Pretending to be an adult.
Suddenly saying you want to meet
Preparing as I always do
Heading out on the last train past midnight
I replied
Even if you told me to stop...
